zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III於1220年出生在可特格希 貝也纽伦堡時，他的父親Conrad Von Zollern-Nürmberg III - Burggraf von Zollern-Nurnberg34歲，母親Adelheid von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen30歲。他於1244年4月10日與Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien在德國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1297年8月13日在德國貝也米特爾福藍肯藍德可萊斯 費爾斯卡多爾茲包格享年77歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫海爾斯布洛倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III于1220年出生在可特格希 貝也纽伦堡时，他的父亲Conrad Von Zollern-Nürmberg III - Burggraf von Zollern-Nurnberg34岁，母亲Adelheid von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen30岁。他于1244年4月10日与Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien在德国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1297年8月13日在德国貝也米特爾福藍肯藍德可萊斯 費爾斯卡多爾茲包格享年77岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫海爾斯布洛倫。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Burggraf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: occupational or status name for the highest ranking judge of a castle and its adjacent territory or the governor of a town, from Middle High German burc ‘castle’ + grāve ‘highest (territorial) judge’, such a person being appointed by the king.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Nürnberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Nürnberg): habitational name from the city of Nuremberg (German Nürnberg) in Bavaria.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Nürnberg): variant of Nierenberg . Compare Nuernberg .

variants.name: Nierenberg
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the city of Nurembergin northern Bavaria, Yiddish name Nirnberg, German nameNürnberg, or from another place similarly named.

variants.name: Nuernberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Guenther, Hans.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III was born in 1220, in Nuremberg, Bavaria, his father, Conrad Von Zollern-Nürmberg III - Burggraf von Zollern-Nurnberg, was 34 and his mother, Adelheid von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen, was 30. He married Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien on 10 April 1244, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 August 1297, in Cadolzburg, Fürth District, Middle Franconia, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 77, and was buried in Heilsbronn, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III est né en 1220, à Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern, son père, Conrad Von Zollern-Nürmberg III - Burggraf von Zollern-Nurnberg, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien le 10 avril 1244, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 août 1297, à Cadolzburg, Landkreis Fürth, Mittelfranken, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III 1220 in Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conrad Von Zollern-Nürmberg III - Burggraf von Zollern-Nurnberg 34 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen 30. Er hat am 10. April 1244 in Deutschland Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. August 1297 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Cadolzburg, Landkreis Fürth, Mittelfranken, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III è nato il nel 1220 nel Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern, il suo padre, Conrad Von Zollern-Nürmberg III - Burggraf von Zollern-Nurnberg, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien il 10 aprile 1244, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 agosto 1297, nel Cadolzburg, Landkreis Fürth, Mittelfranken, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg IIIが1220年にクoニグレイチ バイエルンンuルンバーグで生まれた時，父Conrad Von Zollern-Nürmberg III - Burggraf von Zollern-Nurnbergは34歳，母Adelheid von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausenは30歳であった。1244年4月10日にドイツでElisabeth von Andechs-Meranienと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1297年8月13日にドイツバイエルンミッテルフランケンランドクレイス フuルスカドルズブルグで77歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチヘイルスブロンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III(이)가 1220년 ko니그레이치 베이른 뉘른베르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conrad Von Zollern-Nürmberg III - Burggraf von Zollern-Nurnberg(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1244년 4월 10일 독일에서 Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 8월 13일 독일 베이른 미텔프랭켄 랜드크레이스 프u르스 카도즈버그에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 헤이스브론에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III nasceu em 1220, em Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern, seu pai, Conrad Von Zollern-Nürmberg III - Burggraf von Zollern-Nurnberg, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien em 10 de abril de 1244, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1297, em Cadolzburg, Landkreis Fürth, Mittelfranken, Bayern, Alemanha, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III родился в 1220 г. в местности Нюрнберг, кoниграич беиирн, его отцу по имени Conrad Von Zollern-Nürmberg III - Burggraf von Zollern-Nurnberg было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien 10 апреля 1244 г. в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 августа 1297 г. в местности кадолзбург, ландкрис фuрт, миттелфрэнкен, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности хилсбронн, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg Burggraf von Nürnberg III nació en 1220, en Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern, su papá, Conrad Von Zollern-Nürmberg III - Burggraf von Zollern-Nurnberg, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Elisabeth von Andechs-Meranien el 10 de abril de 1244, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1297, en Cadolzburg, Landkreis Fürth, Mittelfranken, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Heilsbronn, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania.
